title: cullenia ceylanica
intro: Cullenia ceylanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Ceylon oak or Cullenia. It is native to Sri Lanka and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. Cullenia ceylanica has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and the treatment of skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
